extracted_information: The web content describes a cannabis app named 'Buddy' focusing on personalized cannabis information, AI-driven tools, and community-based reviews. It highlights the app's mission to offer a better user experience compared to existing cannabis apps.

features.name: Personalized Cannabis Information
features.description: Cannabis information personalized to the user, helping them understand how cannabis will make them feel and what others genuinely think about it.

features.name: AI Product Identification
features.description: Users can take a picture of any cannabis product to instantly find out everything about it using 'Meaningful AI'.

features.name: AI Knowledge Machine
features.description: Utilizes a 'knowledge machine' to provide meaningful and trusted information about cannabis.

features.name: Real Cannabis Reviews
features.description: A system for trusted reviews where users can post about their favorite products and see how others are using them. Reviews are by real people.

features.name: Social Engagement
features.description: Features designed to help users 'make friends and share cannabis experiences together', fostering a community around cannabis.
